project: Admin Portal Light/Dark Mode Theme System
description: Extend the existing portal light/dark mode theming to the admin portal (/admin/* routes). Reuses the same next-themes infrastructure, PortalThemeProvider, and .portal-theme-scope CSS variable overrides. Adds theme toggle to all admin headers and fixes hardcoded Tailwind colors.

userStories.title: Wrap admin layout with ThemeProvider and theme scope
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the admin layout wrapped with the existing PortalThemeProvider and portal-theme-scope class so light theme CSS variables cascade into admin pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/app/admin/layout.tsx: import PortalThemeProvider from ../portal/PortalThemeProvider
Wrap the existing <div> children with <PortalThemeProvider>
Add class 'portal-theme-scope' to the existing wrapper div (the one with min-h-screen)
Admin login page (/admin) inherits theme scope automatically since it's a child of admin layout
Marketing pages (/, /case-studies, /privacy, /terms) must NOT be affected — verify root layout has no portal-theme-scope
Portal pages (/portal/*) continue working exactly as before
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The admin layout is at src/app/admin/layout.tsx. It's a server component. PortalThemeProvider is a 'use client' component at src/app/portal/PortalThemeProvider.tsx — it wraps next-themes ThemeProvider with attribute='data-theme', storageKey='claru-portal-theme', enableSystem. The portal-theme-scope class matches the CSS selector [data-theme='light'] .portal-theme-scope in globals.css which overrides all CSS variables for light mode.

userStories.title: Add theme toggle to admin dashboard header and fix hardcoded colors
userStories.description: As an admin user, I want a theme toggle on the dashboard page and correct CSS variable usage for module card icon colors.
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/app/admin/dashboard/page.tsx: the dashboard has an inline header (not a shared component) — it must become a client component or the header must be extracted
Since the dashboard page uses async server data fetching, extract the header into a new client component AdminDashboardHeader at src/app/admin/dashboard/AdminDashboardHeader.tsx
AdminDashboardHeader includes: claru/admin breadcrumb, Sun/Moon theme toggle button, [logout] link
Theme toggle uses useTheme from next-themes with mounted guard pattern (useState + useEffect) to prevent hydration mismatch
Toggle shows Moon icon when dark, Sun icon when light (h-4 w-4, strokeWidth 1.5)
Toggle onClick: if resolvedTheme is 'dark' set to 'light', otherwise set to 'dark'
Toggle styled: text-[var(--text-muted)] hover:text-[var(--text-primary)] transition-colors duration-200
Toggle has aria-label: 'Switch to light mode' or 'Switch to dark mode' based on resolvedTheme
Fix hardcoded color on Job Board module card: change 'text-blue-400' to 'text-[var(--accent-tertiary)]'
Fix hardcoded color on Data Catalog module card: change 'text-purple-400' to 'text-[var(--accent-primary)]'
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: The dashboard page at src/app/admin/dashboard/page.tsx is an async server component that fetches job/lead/dataset counts. It has an inline header section with breadcrumb and logout link. Since we need useTheme (client-only hook), extract just the header bar into a client component. The module cards array has a 'color' field — two entries use hardcoded Tailwind colors: 'text-blue-400' (Job Board) at line 51 and 'text-purple-400' (Data Catalog) at line 69. The admin login is at /admin (not /admin/login) and requires email+password auth, different from portal magic link.

userStories.title: Add theme toggle to AdminJobsHeader, AdminCatalogHeader, and AdminLeadsHeader
userStories.description: As an admin user, I want a theme toggle available on all admin subpages (jobs, catalog, leads) so I can switch themes from any page.
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/app/admin/components/AdminJobsHeader.tsx: add Sun/Moon theme toggle button
Update src/app/admin/catalog/AdminCatalogHeader.tsx: add Sun/Moon theme toggle button
Update src/app/admin/leads/AdminLeadsHeader.tsx: add Sun/Moon theme toggle button
In each header: import useTheme from next-themes, import Sun and Moon from lucide-react
In each header: add mounted state guard (useState + useEffect) to prevent hydration mismatch
Position the toggle button before the [settings] link in the right-side actions area
Toggle shows Moon icon when dark, Sun icon when light (h-4 w-4, strokeWidth 1.5)
Toggle onClick: if resolvedTheme is 'dark' set to 'light', otherwise set to 'dark'
Toggle styled consistently: text-[var(--text-muted)] hover:text-[var(--text-primary)] p-1 rounded transition-colors duration-200
Toggle has dynamic aria-label based on resolvedTheme
When mounted is false, render a placeholder div (h-4 w-4) to prevent layout shift
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: All three headers are 'use client' components with the same structure: breadcrumb left, actions right. AdminJobsHeader is at src/app/admin/components/AdminJobsHeader.tsx. AdminCatalogHeader is at src/app/admin/catalog/AdminCatalogHeader.tsx. AdminLeadsHeader is at src/app/admin/leads/AdminLeadsHeader.tsx. Each already imports useRouter and useCallback. Add the toggle before the [settings] link. Reference PortalNav.tsx for the exact mounted guard pattern.

userStories.title: Fix hardcoded colors in admin catalog components
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to replace all hardcoded Tailwind color classes in catalog components with CSS variable references so they adapt to both themes.
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/app/admin/catalog/DatasetForm.tsx: replace all instances of text-red-400 with text-[var(--error)]
Update src/app/admin/catalog/DatasetForm.tsx: replace all instances of bg-red-500/10 with bg-[var(--error)]/10
Update src/app/admin/catalog/DatasetForm.tsx: replace all instances of border-red-500/20 with border-[var(--error)]/20
Update src/app/admin/catalog/DatasetForm.tsx: replace hover:bg-red-500/20 with hover:bg-[var(--error)]/20
Update src/app/admin/catalog/DatasetForm.tsx: replace text-red-400/60 with text-[var(--error)]/60
Update src/app/admin/catalog/DatasetForm.tsx: replace hover:text-red-400 with hover:text-[var(--error)]
Update src/app/admin/catalog/[id]/CatalogEditClient.tsx: replace all instances of text-red-400 with text-[var(--error)]
Update src/app/admin/catalog/[id]/CatalogEditClient.tsx: replace all instances of bg-red-500/10 with bg-[var(--error)]/10
Update src/app/admin/catalog/[id]/CatalogEditClient.tsx: replace all instances of border-red-500/20 with border-[var(--error)]/20
Update src/app/admin/catalog/[id]/CatalogEditClient.tsx: replace hover:bg-red-500/20 with hover:bg-[var(--error)]/20
Update src/app/admin/catalog/[id]/CatalogEditClient.tsx: replace text-red-400/60 with text-[var(--error)]/60 and hover:text-red-400 with hover:text-[var(--error)]
Verify zero hardcoded red/blue/purple/yellow color classes remain in DatasetForm.tsx and CatalogEditClient.tsx
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: DatasetForm.tsx has hardcoded red colors at lines 220-221 (error box), 396 (hover delete), 458 (error text), 464 (delete button), 478 (remove link). CatalogEditClient.tsx has hardcoded red colors at lines 295 (error text), 302 (delete button), 323 (remove link). All are error/danger semantic colors that should map to var(--error). Do NOT modify src/app/admin/settings/page.tsx — its hex colors are for email templates rendered in email clients.

userStories.title: Fix hardcoded colors in admin leads and jobs components
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to replace all hardcoded Tailwind color classes in leads/jobs components with CSS variable references.
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/app/admin/leads/AdminLeadsTable.tsx: replace text-yellow-400 with text-[var(--warning)]
Update src/app/admin/leads/AdminLeadsTable.tsx: replace bg-yellow-500/10 with bg-[var(--warning)]/10
Update src/app/admin/leads/AdminLeadsTable.tsx: replace border-yellow-500/20 with border-[var(--warning)]/20
Update src/app/admin/leads/AdminLeadsTable.tsx: replace text-red-400 with text-[var(--error)]
Update src/app/admin/leads/AdminLeadsTable.tsx: replace bg-red-500/10 with bg-[var(--error)]/10
Update src/app/admin/leads/AdminLeadsTable.tsx: replace border-red-500/20 with border-[var(--error)]/20
Update src/app/admin/components/AdminJobsTable.tsx: replace text-red-400 with text-[var(--error)]
Update src/app/admin/components/AdminJobsTable.tsx: replace border-red-400/30 with border-[var(--error)]/30
Update src/app/admin/components/LeadDetailClient.tsx: replace text-red-400 with text-[var(--error)]
Update src/app/admin/components/LeadDetailClient.tsx: replace border-red-400/30 with border-[var(--error)]/30
Check src/app/admin/catalog/import/page.tsx for bg-yellow-500/5 and replace with bg-[var(--warning)]/5 if found
Verify zero hardcoded red/yellow color classes remain in these files
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: AdminLeadsTable.tsx has hardcoded colors at lines 40 (pending badge - yellow), 46 (rejected badge - red), 209 (pending stat - yellow), 225 (rejected stat - red). AdminJobsTable.tsx has hardcoded red at line 63 (archived status). LeadDetailClient.tsx has hardcoded red at line 72 (rejected status). The import page at src/app/admin/catalog/import/page.tsx has bg-yellow-500/5 at line 1317.

userStories.title: Visual QA of all admin pages in both themes
userStories.description: As QA, I need to verify all admin pages render correctly in both light and dark modes with no regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigate to /admin (login page) — verify it renders correctly in both light and dark themes
Navigate to /admin/dashboard — verify module cards, header, stats all styled correctly in both themes
Verify the theme toggle icon updates correctly when switching (Moon in dark, Sun in light)
Navigate to /admin/jobs — verify the jobs table and header look correct in both themes
Navigate to /admin/catalog — verify the catalog table and header look correct in both themes
Navigate to /admin/leads — verify the leads table and header look correct in both themes
Verify theme persists after page navigation between admin pages
Verify navigating to marketing page (/) shows dark theme always, then back to admin shows saved theme
Verify navigating to portal (/portal/login) shares the same theme preference as admin
Check browser console for zero hydration mismatch warnings on admin pages
Run a grep scan of src/app/admin/ for any remaining hardcoded Tailwind color classes (red-400, blue-400, purple-400, yellow-400) excluding settings/page.tsx email templates
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Admin auth requires email+password (not magic link like portal). Use the admin login at /admin. The admin may require valid credentials — if so, focus on the login page visual QA and the hardcoded color grep scan. Key pages to verify: /admin, /admin/dashboard, /admin/jobs, /admin/catalog, /admin/leads, /admin/settings. The settings page has inline email template HTML with hardcoded hex colors — those are intentional and should NOT be changed.
